ogTitle: Willbriggie vs Willi Willi: Climate Safety

heading: Willbriggie vs Willi Willi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willbriggie, New South Wales and Willi Willi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willbriggie has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Willi Willi (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willbriggie or Willi Willi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willbriggie has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Willi Willi scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willbriggie scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Willi Willi scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willbriggie or Willi Willi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willbriggie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
